Still feeling sick today and sneezing alot with a runny nose but otherwise I ' m feeling pretty good . I have work in a couple hours at the restaurant and it ' s Friday night so I ' m sure I ' ll be busy making a ton of drinks .

I ' m still feeling kinda sickly but I powered through at work last night . It ' s was so crazy busy that I could barely keep up . I love when that happens haha . I ended out the night very sore but over 300 dollars richer so I can ' t complain

I feel worried more than nervous . I worry due to financial situations . I feel disappointed that I don’t make good decisions . I feel want more stability financially and emotionally , I spend much time day dreaming of my life in the future . I suppose I’m discontent with my current position in life .

I am feeling happy in general at the moment . I am with family and my mind is taken off of my worries . It’s been a busy day which has helped take my mind off things . I am looking forward to a busy week that will keep my mind occupied .

Right now I’m feeling content . I did have a few drinks and ate some lasagna so that could’ve helped . Tomorrow I begin a busy week since it is spring break the next couple weeks will be pretty busy . I also have an exam in school but I’ll deal with that later .

I am at work today and it will be busy so I don’t have much time to think about how I feel . I feel indifferent at the moment and am hopeful that it will be a good day . I have to focus on work and school and can’t let my mental state distract me too much .

I’m happy at the moment . I get to go see my girlfriend after work and I work with fun people today so it’s not bad . Tomorrow is going to be busy with school . It’s cold today which sucks because we had 2 days of 80 degree weather . I’m ready for summer because there’s a lot of outdoor activities that take place . I feel like I don’t get out enough .

I have to stay late at work so I’m not happy about that . I also have been looking for new jobs but I don’t know what I want to do and am not qualified for anything . I do not have a passion I feel like I can’t afford to have any passions or hobbies .

I actually feel pretty good today . I have school but I only have two classes and next week is spring break although I’ll have to work a lot . I could use the hours though . All in all I’m optimistic about today .

I feel restless and not that happy . I just want to be in a good place financially and mentally . I try and be positive but it doesn’t work usually . I wish I could just know what to do to improve my mood .

My day is coming to a close with a few drinks . I shouldn’t drink that much it makes me feel fat . I need to work out more and I have time it’s just a motivation thing . I want to but I just can’t bring myself to do it . I feel stuck .

Today is busy work wise . I have a lot to do and can’t really focus on my mental state . I do feel restless though but that’s probably because I’m so busy . Tomorrow will be busy too . I do like when it’s busy since it keeps my mind occupied .

I didn’t get enough sleep last night so I’m feeling tired at the moment . Work is busy due to spring break so that could be where my stress is coming from at the moment . I won’t have another day off for 10 days so that’ll be fun .

I got to leave work early so that makes me happy . I ate some good food so that makes me happy too . Overall today was not that bad . I wish all days could at least feel like this or better . Maybe it’s just a matter if mindset .

It’s a nice day out so I’m happy . I ate a good lunch with my girlfriend so today has been good . I do work later but it is what it is . Hopefully it’s not super busy because I don’t want people at work to ruin my good mood . People can be so intolerable .

I’m happy right now because I don’t have to go into work which is good . I did have a few drinks I don’t feel like that was smart but it’s okay . I’ve pretty much just accepted that this is a part of life for now that I’ll deal with later .

I’m tired right now . Not sure why . I was day drinking so that probably would do it . Anyway I’m not necessarily unhappy . I am tired though . I go to work early tomorrow and it’s Friday so it’ll be busy . Hopefully the day goes fast .

I don’t feel great this morning . I don’t want to go to work and deal with people . Some people are so entitled and don’t care how they make you feel as long as they get their way . Other people are great and are no problem but I don’t understand why some have to be so bad .

It hasn’t been a bad day but it’s moving slowly . Today is the first day of nine straight days I have to work . It’s also cold today and cloudy , I wish the sun would come out . I get off in about 2 hours so hopefully it goes fast .

Im doing okay . I’ve felt better and felt worse so overall not that bad . I wish I could just be content all the time . I don’t know how to improve my state of mind . Anyway tomorrow is a new day but also kind of the same in every way .

My girlfriend seems off and I’m not sure if it’s because my mood or not . I’m sure it’s nothing but if it is me I didn’t do it in purpose . When I ask her she says it’s not but I still don’t believe her . Sounds like a me problem .

Work is busy but not that bad . The people have been nice . I’m doing better than earlier today and actually feel a bit happy . I wish I enjoyed my job everyday . Maybe once I move on to something better I will .

My girlfriend is leaving for a few days which sucks because we usually spend today together . Also the time changes tomorrow and I’m going to lose an hour of sleep so that’s not fun . Anyway it is what it is .

Busy day at work hopefully it’s not too bad . I’m tired from the time change . I don’t really know what to say for this right now . Sometimes I don’t really feel like anything so sorry if this entry isn’t that helpful .

Today has been long . A lot of people are getting sick that I know . Also at work the printer isn’t working and I can’t figure out what’s wrong with it and it’s super annoying because I’m not an IT guy .

I’m running late to work , someone almost hit my car and my shift is like 10 hours today . People have been leaving bad reviews on ORG  as well . My staff and I are trying our best to make these people happy but all they can do is leave bad reviews .

Work has been busy today . They day has gotten better from earlier . The sun is out and the weather is nice which is nice but I wish I could go enjoy it . Today has not been awful like I thought it was gonna be .

Today has been long but all in all it hasn’t been bad . The time change has made me tired but I’m making it . Still have a long week ahead of me but I’m sure it’ll be fine and then I have a break Saturday which will be nice .

Work was long yesterday so I’m pretty tired today but today is going smoothly . I’m not stressed and the people I’ve had today have been nice . The sun is out and it’s getting warmer . I only have 4 more days until my next day off .

I get to spend time with my girlfriend tonight which makes me happy . We made pizza and watched a movie . This week has been long but it’s almost half way done . I could use a break from work . It’s been so busy I haven’t had time to think .

I have a headache , I usually get between 3 and 4 headaches a week . No telling what this one is from . I don’t work until later today so I’m happy about that . I’m stressed though because my dog has a hot spot and he’ll need to go to the vet so that’s another thing I have to deal with .

On day 6 in a row with having to go to work with 3 more still to go . It’s not a physically demanding job but when you’re dealing with people it gets tiring . And people are never satisfied . They act like they’re talking to a machine and not a person .

Today has not been as bad as I thought it would be . The guests have been nice and easy to deal with . Only two more days until my next day off . I’ve been feeling better in general lately . Hopefully it continues .

I have two more days of work and then a day off . My girlfriend and I are going down town and definitely going to drink but not in a “today sucked I’m sad” way . So I’m not sure if that will skew your results . Anyway today I’m optimistic a rare feeling for me .

Todays been busy and I’m ready to leave . The person replacing me today is always late so I’m sure it’ll happen today . I’m impatient today and all I can think about is going home . Today hasn’t been totally bad but it could’ve gone better .

I had a good dinner and time with my family . Tomorrow is my last day of work before I have off . The past few days my mood has been improving I’ve been happier and more energetic overall . Things are on the up and up .

I have off tomorrow so I’m happy . I just have to make it through one more shift . I definitely could use the break . This spring break has been so busy and I’ve worked 9 days in a row . I’m going to remain positive today .

Today has been a busy day . I have 3 more hours before I can go home so I’m excited about that . Work hasn’t been terrible today so I think I’m gonna make it through . I can’t wait for a day off tomorrow .

I am relieved that I’m off from work for a couple of days . It’s nice to have a break after working for 10 days straight . It’ll be good to have some time to catch up with friends and family , and I’m going to take my dog on a walk .

I was stressed this morning because I had a lot to get done . I’m doing much better now because I finished all of my tasks , and now I get to enjoy my day off with my family and girlfriend . We are spending the day outside .

I’m sorry I missed my 3 o’clock survey . Today has been busy I’ve been on a “staycation” with my girlfriend and family . But I am happy and I’m not stressed for once and it’s been a good day . I also have tomorrow off I’m good for a bit .
